name: Memory Aegis v4
description: Local-first memory engine for OpenClaw — smart recall, automatic maintenance, conflict detection, and guided setup. No cloud required.

preset.description: Memory profile: 'minimal' (lightweight), 'balanced' (default, recommended), 'local-safe' (privacy-first with archiving), 'full' (all layers enabled).

retrievalMaxHops.description: Maximum graph traversal depth for spreading activation

decayHalfLifeDays.description: Half-life for temporal decay of volatile memories

crystallizationThreshold.description: Minimum spaced recalls before crystallization eligible

maintenanceCron.description: Cron schedule for background maintenance (decay, pruning, promotion)

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: [Basic] Search long-term memory for context relevant to a query.

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: [Advanced] Read a specific memory node by citation path.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: [Basic] Save new information into long-term memory.

tools.name: memory_backup
tools.description: [Advanced] Create a snapshot backup (binary) or JSONL logical export of all memories.

mode.description: Backup mode: 'snapshot' (SQLite binary copy) or 'logical' (JSONL export).

destDir.description: Directory to store the backup file.

tools.name: memory_restore
tools.description: [Advanced] Restore memory database from a .db.bak snapshot file.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: [Basic] Memory count, growth trend, health status, and taxonomy overview.

tools.name: memory_doctor
tools.description: [Advanced] Run full health diagnostics: FTS integrity, schema version, node counts, anomaly detection.

tools.name: memory_clean
tools.description: [Advanced] Run maintenance: expire TTL nodes, resolve conflicts, archive old data, classify unlabeled memories.

dryRun.description: If true, only report what would be cleaned without making changes.

tools.name: memory_taxonomy
tools.description: [Advanced] Inspect or fix memory label distribution — view stats, find stray labels, migrate old taxonomy.

action.description: 'stats' shows distribution, 'stray' finds non-v1 labels, 'migrate' converts old labels.

tools.name: memory_debug
tools.description: [Advanced] Power-user debug panel: trace retrieval signals, inspect node metadata, view supersede chains.

action.description: 'search' traces retrieval signals, 'inspect' shows full node metadata, 'supersede' shows supersede chain.

query.description: Search query (for action='search') or node ID (for action='inspect'/'supersede').

tools.name: memory_profile
tools.description: [Basic] Show what Aegis remembers about you: identity, preferences, projects, and recent facts.

tools.name: memory_setup
tools.description: [Basic] Guided first-time setup: health check, store test, recall test, and quick start guide.

skills.name: remember
skills.description: Lưu thông tin vào bộ nhớ dài hạn.
skills.prompt: Store the following information into Aegis long-term memory using the memory_store tool. Confirm what was stored.

skills.name: recall
skills.description: Truy vấn bộ nhớ dài hạn.
skills.prompt: Search Aegis memory using the memory_search tool for context relevant to the user's query. Present results clearly with sources and relevance scores.

skills.name: memory-status
skills.description: Xem trạng thái bộ nhớ tổng quan.
skills.prompt: Run memory_stats and memory_doctor tools. Show a clear summary: how many memories, health status, taxonomy distribution, recent growth, any issues.

skills.name: memory-clean
skills.description: Dọn dẹp và bảo trì bộ nhớ.
skills.prompt: Run memory_clean tool to perform maintenance. Report: expired nodes, archived nodes, taxonomy migrations, contradictions found.

skills.name: memory-backup
skills.prompt: Run memory_backup tool with mode='snapshot'. Report the backup file path, size, and checksum.

skills.name: memory-profile
skills.description: Xem Aegis đang nhớ gì về bạn.
skills.prompt: Run memory_profile tool. Show the user what Aegis remembers about them: identity, preferences, projects, workflows, and recent knowledge.

skills.name: memory-setup
skills.prompt: Run memory_setup tool to perform guided onboarding. Show each check result and the quick start guide.
